text:
madpilot    2012-05-25 20:49:45 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    .                    LEGAL 
    games                Makefile 
  Added files:
    games/rftg           Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Race for the Galaxy AI is a GTK-based version of the card game of the
  same name supporting both online multiplayer and man-vs-machine modes.
  
  WWW: http://www.keldon.net/rftg/
  
  PR:             ports/156362
  Submitted by:   "Miles V. Aronnax" <miles@aronnax.net>
  Approved by:    crees (mentor), tabthorpe (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.701     +2 -1      ports/LEGAL
  1.1437    +1 -0      ports/games/Makefile
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/games/rftg/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/games/rftg/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/games/rftg/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +48 -0     ports/games/rftg/pkg-plist (new)
